funFacts: The Nissan Skyline is highly famous in pop culture and car movies, commonly referred to by car fans as 'Godzilla'.
The Nissan Nissan Skyline R34 GT-R is a legendary Japanese sports car, powered by a twin-turbo inline-6 engine producing 276 horsepower.
